title: adesmia lanata
intro: Adesmia lanata, also known as the woolly pea or woolly bush, is a plant species native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adesmia lanata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. Adesmia lanata can be prepared for use as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional herbal medicine.
